verse_text: Then Zerubbabel the son of Shealtiel from the tribe of Judah, and Joshua the son of Jehozadak the high priest, with all the remnant of the people, heeded the word of the Lord their God and the words of Haggai the prophet, as the Lord their God had sent him to them, and the people feared in the presence of the Lord.

pericope.title: The Command to Rebuild the Lord's House

links.context: The temple will be rebuilt, but not as it was before. The second temple, not as glorious, was completed in approximately 515 BC (see [[HAG.1:1]]-15).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
